name: tauri-plugin-mcp
author: Pegleg
description: Guest bindings for tauri-plugin-mcp — lets AI agents interact with and debug Tauri apps

scripts.build:server: cd mcp-server-ts && pnpm i && pnpm build
scripts.build:all: pnpm build && pnpm build-plugin && pnpm build:server
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules dist-js target mcp-server-ts/node_modules mcp-server-ts/dist
